gate: M1.6 deal creation, deal sharing, and socket scoping

codeChanges.summary: shareDeal socket emit now uses the updated deal record so newly added assisting reps receive scoped deal:updated events.
Added focused coverage for admin-created deals with selected assigned reps and shareDeal scoped socket rooms.

bugFixed.before: shareDeal emitted using the pre-update deal.assistingRepIds array, so a newly shared rep did not receive inbox:{repId} real-time notifications.
bugFixed.after: shareDeal emits with updated.assignedRepId and updated.assistingRepIds, covering primary, assisting reps, and actor rooms.

focusedTests.command: cd server && npx vitest run tests/dealControllerScope.test.ts tests/dealScopePolicy.test.ts tests/inboxReplyReclassification.test.ts
focusedTests.notes: Redis ECONNREFUSED noise can appear locally, but the focused tests completed green.

browserSmoke.environment: Vite production preview on 127.0.0.1:4177 with mock API on 127.0.0.1:3001
browserSmoke.notes: Browser mock API did not implement Socket.IO, so websocket connection warnings are outside this browser gate; socket scoping is covered by focused backend tests.
